input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for CryptoConditions.

source_facts.claim: CryptoConditions: Although this amendment is enabled, it has no effect unless the SusPay amendment is also enabled. The SusPay amendment was replaced by the Escrow amendment, so the CryptoConditions amendment has no effect.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
CryptoConditions appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 0.50.0.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
